title: pimpinella thellungiana
intro: Pimpinella thellungiana, also known as Bhut Jolokia's relative, the Bhut Jolokia's close relative,  or  Bhut Jolokia's close relative,  is a plant species in the family Apiaceae, commonly found in the Himalayan region. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The plant has various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating respiratory issues, such as cough and cold. Pimpinella thellungiana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often consumed to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
